title: pyrus × micromalus
intro: Pyrus × micromalus, also known as Pyrus malus or apple, is a hybrid species of the Malus genus, resulting from the cross between Malus domestica and a wild species of Pyrus. The medicinal properties of Pyrus × micromalus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes. The health benefits of consuming Pyrus × micromalus include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pyrus × micromalus can be prepared as herbal tea, juice, or dried fruit, which can be consumed raw or used in traditional medicine preparations.
